analysis.reasoning: Core message: EU presidents are signing a declaration launching the Conference on the Future of Europe, enabling citizen participation in reshaping EU policies and institutions. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly about past achievements or learning from history; no. EU2 (union) – implies institutional coordination but does not emphasize unity or solidarity; weak/implicit at best; no. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – yes: highlights a concrete initiative to involve citizens directly in policymaking, portraying the EU as responsive and practical for its citizens. EU4 (avant-garde) – somewhat about procedural innovation, but not framed as pioneering leadership on major challenges; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – no external human-rights/democracy framing; no. EU6 (better world) – no external/global dimension; no. Conclusion: Promotes EU3.
